en: I don't think anybody knows what the hell's going on around here.
ko: 여기서 무슨 일이 일어나고 있는지 아는 사람은 없는 것 같아요.

en: It's the goddamn English doing everything by the book.
There's no need for language, Mr. Hockley.
Go back and turn the heaters on in our rooms. I'd like a cup of tea when I return.
ko: 돌아가서 우리 방의 히터를 켜 주세요.

en: Mr. Andrews? I saw the iceberg, and I see it in your eyes.
The ship will sink. Are you certain?
Yes. In an hour or so.
All this will be at the bottom of the Atlantic. What?
ko: 이 모든 것이 대서양 바닥에 있을 겁니다.

en: Please, tell only who you must. I don't want to be responsible for a panic and get to a boat.
ko: 제발, 꼭 필요한 사람에게만 말해 주세요.
